text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
U-u-u-um, Doto? Do you have a<n>moment? I'm
really sorry to bother<n>you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to talk to you about your recent<n>condition
and... race-readiness...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That day, Agnes Digital summoned<n>her courage
and spoke with Meisho<n>Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come when we<n>get to learn of
the results of her<n>intervention.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! I can't! My oshi! I can't<n>even look at
her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's Doto's first graded race! I swear<n>if my
meddling causes her to screw<n>up, I'll just... I just
hope she's able<n>to finish safely!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's first attempt at a<n>graded race is
the G2 Nikkei Shinshun<n>Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Not much is expected from her<n>though, considering
she's eighth on<n>the list of favorites.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here comes Meisho Doto!<n>Meisho Doto
brings it in for a<n>shocking second-place finish!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a knockout comeback after her<n>slump at the
end of the year! What<n>could have been the
catalyst?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh... She got second?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! She did it! My oshi did it! My<n>unsolicited
advice didn't lead her<n>astray!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital still believes that she<n>crossed the
line. But then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Digital! Digital! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Your talk on race-readiness helped<n>me power
through my disaster period.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I kept telling myself everything would<n>be okay,
and it's finally happened.<n>I'm so grateful you
talked to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
D-Doto?! Wait. Hold on, please... My<n>heart... I
can't take any more...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: It's aaall thanks to you, Digital.Sniffle... Thank you so, so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bwaaaagh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like a whole new world has<n>opened... My
body feels... full...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital experiences a moment<n>of nirvana
thanks to Meisho Doto's<n>heartfelt gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyah! I'm so sorry. I got so<n>overwhelmed hearing
you say that.<n>Everything went blank!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So you don't hate me? Even though I<n>lectured you
like I was some kind of<n>know-it-all?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I really appreciate what you did. Ineed assistance and support inorder to get better.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Really? You? How could that betrue for a practically real-life angel?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A real-life a-angel? Oh my goodness...<n>I'm nothing
like that, honest!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I... can't do anything on my own.<n>That's why I
need to learn and<n>experience a lot of different
things... if<n>I want to bridge the gap.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So... I really didn't bother you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Also... when you said you want to<n>"bridge the
gap," did you mean, like...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The gap between you and Opera O? Is<n>it because
growing apart hurts too<n>much???

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Especially when she's all you everdreamed of?!? And you'd doanything to be by her side?!!?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That's right. ♪ After all...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I respect Opera O so much. I want to<n>be as
confident as her one day!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto speaks without<n>hesitation, and a light
I've never seen<n>before flashes in Agnes Digital's
eyes as she takes it in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Or should I say, my<n>comrade in
simping? I've got a<n>question for you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What does it mean to be sublime?
choice_data_list: That's kind of a broad question...
That's kind of a broad question...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right. But... I feel like I<n>don't
understand it anymore.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought keeping my distance from<n>the sacred
Umas was the de facto<n>proper behavior. But now
I've gone<n>and engaged with Doto directly, and
what happened?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She smiled at me... She spoke to me<n>about her
object of admiration... and<n>her pure desire to
pursue it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I got a shining glimpse of something<n>I'd never
seen before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What was that? It was differentfrom the usual allure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There was no hint of the squealing or<n>giggling I
expected... It was a totally<n>unadulterated
brilliance...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One so strong, it could purify the<n>entire world...
What is that unknown<n>radiance?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital mulls over this question<n>for a
moment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gyaah! I've got no clue! Literallyno clue! And all this thinking is givingme a headache!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I still don't fully understand the charm<n>of
Umamusume... But from this day<n>forward, I'm
gonna figure out how to<n>figure it out...
choice_data_list: How about trying to find it through racing?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Racing, huh? Yeah... if I don't run<n>alongside them
myself, I might never<n>discover it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. I'll try to take another<n>look at their
purity in the Hyacinth<n>Stakes!
